allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card input label badge select sheet dialog dropdown-menu avatar separator toast --yes)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "No process on 3001" })
